articles.title: Scoble: Compute As A Service Puts Space Datacenters Into The AI Conversation
articles.summary: Robert highlighted a San Francisco demo day company putting NVIDIA datacenters in space and framed it as compute as a service. The post connects SpaceX, orbital infrastructure, and AI compute economics.

articles.title: Scoble: The Demo Day Video Behind The Space Compute Story
articles.summary: Robert posted the video tied to the compute as a service thread. It gives readers the source material behind his space datacenter observation.

articles.title: Scoble: Energy Is Free In Space
articles.summary: Robert replied that energy is free in space during discussion of orbital compute. The comment captures the economic thesis behind putting AI compute outside terrestrial datacenters.

articles.title: Scoble: Being First Does Not Matter In Space Compute
articles.summary: Robert argued that being first does not matter and used Kodak as the cautionary analogy. The comment came in a SpaceX and orbital compute discussion.

articles.title: Scoble: Another Company Already Has A Space Compute Asset Up
articles.summary: Robert noted that another company already has one up in a discussion about SpaceX and orbital compute. The post reinforces that the category is already active, not hypothetical.
